title: PPTX Template Schema
description: Normalized JSON representation of a PPTX slide master and its layouts (US-1.1). This schema is the conformance target for the output of schema_extractor.extract_schema(). It mirrors the Reference JSON Schema in docs/user-stories/chenyu-user-stories.md, with the US-1.1 relaxation that font sub-properties are optional (populated in US-1.4).

title.description: Inferred from docProps/core.xml title, then first slide title, then filename.

title_source.description: Provenance of the title (US-3.1). core_xml/slide1/filename come from inference; 'user' is set by the pptx-generate-template-skill after a user override. Runtime-enforced by validate_template_schema (TITLE_SOURCES), unlike the general additionalProperties case.

generated_by.description: Identifier of the tool that produced this schema (e.g. opencode-pptx-subagent/schema_extractor).

missing_fonts.description: Deduped non-builtin fonts the template depends on (US-1.4). Each entry: {family, is_available:false, fallback, download_url}. validate_template_schema emits a non-fatal WARNING per entry.

header_footer.description: Header/footer detection metadata. Empty/stub in US-1.1 (populated in US-2.1).

theme.description: Color theme and font palette mapped from ppt/theme/theme1.xml. Semantic role mapping is an initial heuristic (refined in US-3.4).

slide_master.description: The slide master parsed explicitly (AC#2). Components are master-level shapes (may be empty for a master with zero shapes).

layout_id.description: Stable identifier derived from the layout name (slug).

component_type_enum.description: Self-documenting list of valid component type values.

placeholder_type_enum.description: Self-documenting list of valid placeholder type values.

component.$comment: Font cardinality rule (architecture review C1): the 'font' property is present ONLY on text-bearing components (type in [textbox, placeholder]) and ABSENT on all other component types. This cross-field constraint is enforced by validate_template_schema(); non-text components carrying 'font' are a validation error.

id.description: Globally unique id across master + all layouts (comp_NNN, zero-padded).

type_confidence.description: Detection confidence for `type`. 'low' = unrecognized fallback (shape_type None/unreadable) or indeterminate MEDIA subtype. Always emitted by schema_extractor; optional here for backward compatibility (US-1.3).

polygon.description: Exactly 4 {x,y} points in TL->TR->BR->BL order, normalized to 0.0-1.0 relative to slide dimensions. Rectangular only in US-1.1 (non-rectangular vertices in US-1.2).
polygon.$comment: Winding (US-1.2): the canonical order TL->TR->BR->BL yields a POSITIVE shoelace signed area, which is algebraically counter-clockwise (CCW = anti-clockwise) -- this is the winding the cross-product check in validate_template_schema() verifies. Note: in screen coords (Y-down) the trace visually appears clockwise, but the algebraic winding (what a cross-product measures) is CCW. maxItems:4 is rectangular-only; non-rectangular vertex extraction (deferred) will require relaxing this constraint.

font.description: Present ONLY on text-bearing components (textbox/placeholder). Populated by schema_extractor per-run (US-1.4); sub-properties optional (null when not explicitly set / inherited).

runs.description: Mixed-formatting runs within a textbox. Empty in US-1.1 (populated in US-1.4).

z_order.description: Stacking order; 0 is the backmost element.

content_template.description: Placeholder pattern like {{slide_title}} for simple substitution. null for non-content elements.

image_properties.description: Present on image components. US-4.6 (C1) captures the asset partname/content_type so the coordinate-placement path can re-source bytes from the template package.

partname.description: Stable /ppt/media/imageN.ext path within the PPTX package.

text_properties.description: Present on text-bearing components. US-4.6 (AC4) populates per-paragraph bullet/spacing so the coordinate-placement path can re-apply bullets when layout inheritance is bypassed.

bullets.description: Per-paragraph bullet/spacing info. Empty when everything is default (inherit).

char.description: Bullet glyph (buChar) or autonum numbering type.
